# IntegriLytics

> Accounting, HR, and operational oversight for small and mid-sized businesses nationwide. Based in Fayetteville, NC; working remotely and on-site across the United States.

IntegriLytics ("Integrity + Analytics") provides one team for accounting, human resources, and operational oversight so business owners can focus on running their business. Free 15-minute consultations are available.

## Services

- [Accounting](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/services/accounting): Bookkeeping, tax prep, payroll, sales tax, and specialized accounting (cost, forensic, trust, non-profit, multi-entity).
- [Human Resources](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/services/hr): Talent acquisition, employee relations, compensation and benefits, HR compliance, workplace safety, and training.
- [Operational Oversight](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/services/operations): Business operations, office administration, process improvement, systems and technology, planning, and performance.

## Company

- [About](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/about): Who we are, our process, where we work, and the industries we support.
- [Book a Consultation](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/book): Remote, office, or on-site consultations; free 15-minute intro calls.

## Resources

Practical guides for small business owners on accounting, HR, taxes, and operations, written by the IntegriLytics team.

- [Accounting 102: The Bones of Your Accounting System](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/the-bones-of-your-accounting-system)
- [Strategy 101: Intro to Operational Strategy](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/strategy-101-intro-to-operational-strategy)
- [HR 101: Welcome to Human Resources](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/hr-101-welcome-to-human-resources)
- [The Better Business Blueprint: Part 5 - Let's Go!](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/the-better-business-blueprint-part-5-let-s-go)
- [The Better Business Blueprint – Part 4: Bringing the Blueprint to Life](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/the-better-business-blueprint-part-4-bringing-the-blueprint-to-life)
- [Better Business Blueprint: Step 3 – Formation](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/better-business-blueprint-step-3-formation)
- [The Better Business Blueprint: Part 2 – Research, Research, Research](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/the-better-business-blueprint-part-2-research-research-research)
- [The Better Business Blueprint: Part 1 - What Is Your Purpose?](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/the-better-business-blueprint-part-1-what-is-your-purpose)
- [Accounting 101: Welcome to Accounting](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/accounting-101)
- [Half-Time Premium: Simple Overtime Guide](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/half-time-premium)
- [Choosing the Right Software for Your Small Business](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/bookkeeping-software)
- [Why Separating Personal and Business Finances Is Crucial for Legal Protection and Clean Bookkeeping](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/separating-personal-and-business-finances)
- [How to Organize Business Receipts for Bookkeeping and Tax Preparation](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/how-to-organize-business-receipts)
- [New Qualified Overtime Rules for 2026: Payroll Processing and Employee Tax Filing Impact](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/new-qualified-overtime-rules-for-2026)
- [Understanding the Differences Between 1099-MISC and 1099-NEC for Tax Reporting](https://www.integrilyticsinc.com/resources/1099-nec-vs-1099-misc)
